items.title: Live Pressing in Front of Guests
items.text: Watching fresh cane being pressed is a spectacle in itself - creating a natural talking point and crowd magnet at your event.

items.title: 100% Natural - No Compromise
items.text: Everything we serve is pure, natural, and fresh. No artificial syrups, no chemicals - just real sugarcane juice.

items.title: Fully Insured & Certified
items.text: We carry full public liability insurance and comply with all food hygiene regulations - complete peace of mind for you.

items.title: Flexible & Responsive
items.text: We work around your schedule, venue, and guest count. Packages from 50 to 1,000+ guests across the UK.
